psalm-85-1.verse:
O Lord, You showed favor to Your land;
  You restored the captivity of Jacob.
psalm-85-1.prayer: Lord, thank You for showing favor and restoring what was broken. Help me recognize Your mercy in every season of renewal.

psalm-85-2.verse:
You forgave the iniquity of Your people;
  You covered all their sin. Selah.
psalm-85-2.prayer: Father, thank You for forgiving sin and covering shame with Your grace. Teach me to walk in repentance and gratitude.

psalm-85-3.verse:
You withdrew all Your fury;
  You turned away from Your burning anger.
psalm-85-3.prayer: Lord, thank You for turning away wrath and offering mercy. Help me never take Your compassion for granted.

psalm-85-4.verse:
Restore us, O God of our salvation,
  And cause Your indignation toward us to cease.
psalm-85-4.prayer: Father, restore me again and draw my heart back to You. Let Your salvation renew my spirit and strengthen my faith.

psalm-85-5.verse:
Will You be angry with us forever?
  Will You prolong Your anger to all generations?
psalm-85-5.prayer: Lord, when discipline feels long or difficult, help me trust Your purpose and wait for Your mercy with hope.

psalm-85-6.verse:
Will You not Yourself revive us again,
  That Your people may rejoice in You?
psalm-85-6.prayer: Father, revive me again so that my heart may rejoice in You. Bring fresh life, joy, and worship into my soul.

psalm-85-7.verse:
Show us Your lovingkindness, O Lord,
  And grant us Your salvation.
psalm-85-7.prayer: Lord, show me Your lovingkindness and grant me Your salvation. Help me rest in Your faithful love.

psalm-85-8.prayer: Father, help me listen carefully to what You speak. Let Your peace guide me, and keep me from returning to foolishness.

psalm-85-9.verse:
Surely His salvation is near to those who fear Him,
  That glory may dwell in our land.
psalm-85-9.prayer: Lord, thank You that Your salvation is near to those who fear You. Let Your glory dwell in my life.

psalm-85-10.verse:
Lovingkindness and truth have met together;
  Righteousness and peace have kissed each other.
psalm-85-10.prayer: Father, let lovingkindness and truth meet in my heart. Let righteousness and peace shape the way I live.

psalm-85-11.verse:
Truth springs from the earth,
  And righteousness looks down from heaven.
psalm-85-11.prayer: Lord, let truth spring up in my life and righteousness shine over me. Help me live faithfully before You.

psalm-85-12.verse:
Indeed, the Lord will give what is good,
  And our land will yield its produce.
psalm-85-12.prayer: Father, thank You for giving what is good. Let my life bear fruit through Your blessing and provision.

psalm-85-13.verse:
Righteousness will go before Him
  And will make His footsteps into a way.
psalm-85-13.prayer: Lord, let righteousness go before me and guide my steps. Help me walk in the path You prepare.

psalm-85-closing.verse:
Lord, thank You for Your mercy, forgiveness, restoration, and peace. Revive my heart again and teach me to listen to Your voice. Let truth, righteousness, and lovingkindness shape my life, and keep me from returning to foolishness. May Your glory dwell in me, and may my steps follow the path of Your righteousness.

In Jesus’ name, Amen.
psalm-85-closing.prayer:
Lord, thank You for Your mercy, forgiveness, restoration, and peace. Revive my heart again and teach me to listen to Your voice. Let truth, righteousness, and lovingkindness shape my life, and keep me from returning to foolishness. May Your glory dwell in me, and may my steps follow the path of Your righteousness.

In Jesus’ name, Amen.
